target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in the shared final assistant text sanitizer.
- Align the embedded stream/block-reply tag matcher and message recompute trigger so chat-channel streaming delivery strips those tags too, including split opener fragments and attribute-bearing openers.
- Keep visible reasoning-prefixed XML-ish tags such as `<reasoning-step>` out of the hidden-control tag grammar.
- Add focused sanitizer, `extractAssistantText`, and subscriber regressions for regular, namespaced, split, attribute-bearing, and reasoning-prefixed visible tags.

## Root Cause

The OpenAI-compatible stream partitioner already recognized `reasoning` tags, but the final sanitizer and embedded stream delivery matchers only covered think/thinking/thought variants. That left `<reasoning>...</reasoning>` text able to survive final assistant extraction or chat block-reply delivery. Split opener fragments could leak when the stream buffered only the older tag names, and attribute-bearing openers could still be missed by the embedded stream scanner even though the shared sanitizer accepted attributes.

The first attribute-support patch used `\b[^<>]*>` as the tag tail. That accepted visible tag names that merely started with `reasoning`, such as `<reasoning-step>`, because `\b` matches before `-` and `.`. The current patch now requires the next character after the recognized control tag name to be whitespace, `/`, or `>`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text and embedded chat block-reply streaming now strip hidden `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` blocks through the same reasoning-tag taxonomy used for existing think/thinking tags, including when opening tags are split across stream chunks or carry attributes. Visible non-control tags such as `<reasoning-step>` remain user-visible.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `8db2013bff`, running the source `extractAssistantText` path, the source `stripReasoningTagsFromText` path, and focused `subscribeEmbeddedAgentSession` block-reply regression tests with `blockReplyBreak: "text_end"`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local `pnpm exec tsx --eval` command that imported `src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts` and extracted assistant text from both `Before <reasoning-step>show this</reasoning-step> After` and `Before <reasoning hidden="1">hide this</reasoning> After`. Also ran the focused Vitest files covering shared sanitizer behavior, embedded extraction, split/attribute-bearing block replies, and visible `reasoning-step` block replies.

Evidence after fix: Console output from the direct `extractAssistantText` run:

```json
{
  "visiblePrefixTag": "Before <reasoning-step>show this</reasoning-step> After",
  "hiddenControlTag": "Before  After"
}
```

Observed result after fix: The visible `reasoning-step` content is preserved, while the hidden `<reasoning hidden="1">...` payload is stripped. Focused subscriber tests also show attribute-bearing reasoning blocks are withheld until the close tag arrives and only the visible final reply is emitted.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, broad changed checks, GitHub CI beyond the checks GitHub ran for this PR, and live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` direct `extractAssistantText` proof above
- `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` direct shared sanitizer probe: `reasoning-step` preserved, `<reasoning hidden="1">` stripped
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files / 206 tests passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.e2e-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed
target.author: monkeyleet
